name: kickoff-scripts
description: Off-chain data, market seeding, activity simulation and resolution keeper for Kickoff (FIFA World Cup 2026 prediction dApp on X Layer).

scripts.check: node --check fetch-worldcup.mjs && node --check create-markets.mjs && node --check simulate-activity.mjs && node --check keeper/resolve.mjs && node --check lib/chain.mjs && node --check lib/abis.mjs && node --check lib/gen-markets.mjs
